'''âp-t-n-v''' ('''kapatnevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lank|lank]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lank|lank]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-t-n-v
|-
! Lemma
| kapatnevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipatnevoko|thipatnevoko]] || [[word:jipatnevoko|jipatnevoko]] || [[word:shipatnevoko|shipatnevoko]] || [[word:kipatnevoko|kipatnevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupatnevoko|thuthupatnevoko]] || [[word:jujupatnevoko|jujupatnevoko]] || [[word:shushupatnevoko|shushupatnevoko]] || [[word:kukupatnevoko|kukupatnevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupatnevoko|thupatnevoko]] || [[word:jupatnevoko|jupatnevoko]] || [[word:shupatnevoko|shupatnevoko]] || [[word:kupatnevoko|kupatnevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupatnevoko|thupatnevoko]] || [[word:jupatnevoko|jupatnevoko]] || [[word:shupatnevoko|shupatnevoko]] || [[word:kupatnevoko|kupatnevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepatnevoko|thepatnevoko]] || [[word:jepatnevoko|jepatnevoko]] || [[word:shepatnevoko|shepatnevoko]] || [[word:kepatnevoko|kepatnevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopatnevoko|thothopatnevoko]] || [[word:jojopatnevoko|jojopatnevoko]] || [[word:shoshopatnevoko|shoshopatnevoko]] || [[word:kokopatnevoko|kokopatnevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopatnevoko|thopatnevoko]] || [[word:jopatnevoko|jopatnevoko]] || [[word:shopatnevoko|shopatnevoko]] || [[word:kopatnevoko|kopatnevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopatnevoko|thopatnevoko]] || [[word:jopatnevoko|jopatnevoko]] || [[word:shopatnevoko|shopatnevoko]] || [[word:kopatnevoko|kopatnevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚpatnevoko|thĂŚpatnevoko]] || [[word:jĂŚpatnevoko|jĂŚpatnevoko]] || [[word:shĂŚpatnevoko|shĂŚpatnevoko]] || [[word:kĂŚpatnevoko|kĂŚpatnevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapatnevoko|thathapatnevoko]] || [[word:jajapatnevoko|jajapatnevoko]] || [[word:shashapatnevoko|shashapatnevoko]] || [[word:kakapatnevoko|kakapatnevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapatnevoko|thapatnevoko]] || [[word:japatnevoko|japatnevoko]] || [[word:shapatnevoko|shapatnevoko]] || [[word:kapatnevoko|kapatnevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapatnevoko|thapatnevoko]] || [[word:japatnevoko|japatnevoko]] || [[word:shapatnevoko|shapatnevoko]] || [[word:kapatnevoko|kapatnevoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
